plurals.name: social_share_info
plurals.item: Yabelana ngezithombe namavidiyo ngokushesha kuzinhlelo zokusebenza zomphakathi ezivela Kukhamera. Khetha ama-app afika kwangu-%1$d. Izithombe namavidiyo okulondolozwe Kufolda Ekhiyiwe akukwazi ukwabiwa.

Yabelana ngezithombe namavidiyo ngokushesha kuzinhlelo zokusebenza zomphakathi ezivela Kukhamera. Khetha ama-app afika kwangu-%1$d. Izithombe namavidiyo okulondolozwe Kufolda Ekhiyiwe akukwazi ukwabiwa.
